title: strongylodon decipiens
intro: Strongylodon decipiens, also known as the "Molave" or "Iron Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and bark contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Strongylodon decipiens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
